name: Ben Potter
html:
CODER
Ben Potter
Works at Coder
We're Hiring Developer Relations Engineer
coder.com/careers
css: .bpmct-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #0d0d0d; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; padding: 8% 6%; box-sizing: border-box; gap: 6%; } .bpmct-logo { font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 5vw, 2.2rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #fff; text-transform: uppercase; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F54242, #F54242 40%, #fff 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; animation: bpmct-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } .bpmct-name { font-size: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.8rem); font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .bpmct-title { font-size: clamp(0.6rem, 2.5vw, 1rem); color: #aaa; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .bpmct-hiring { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4%; border: 1px solid #F54242; border-radius: 6px; padding: 4% 8%; width: 80%; } .bpmct-badge { font-size: clamp(0.55rem, 2.2vw, 0.9rem); font-weight: 800; color: #F54242; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; animation: bpmct-blink 1.5s step-start infinite; } .bpmct-role { font-size: clamp(0.5rem, 2vw, 0.85rem); color: #ddd; text-align: center; } .bpmct-link { font-size: clamp(0.4rem, 1.8vw, 0.75rem); color: #666; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } @keyframes bpmct-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.7; } } @keyframes bpmct-blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0; } }
